metadata.occupation: Registered Physiotherapist, Owner, Suman Wellness Clinic

content: I treated Mr. Arjun Roy for cervical and lumbar strain from August 1 to August 12, 2023. He came daily at 11:30 AM. His condition was worsening—he had severe muscle spasms and was advised bed rest. I provided him with a therapy logbook signed by me. On August 14, our clinic had a power outage from 9 AM to 6 PM. We were closed. I did not see Mr. Roy on that day. I did not issue any medical report on August 14. The report submitted to Bharat Life Insurance is not mine. I do not know how it was forged. I have no connection to Priya Roy beyond treating her husband. I am shocked to see my signature on those documents. I have never met Rajesh Choudhary.
